og.title: One-Click Report — PDF Generator + AI Summary
og.description: Turn CSV/JSON into visual PDF reports with AI summaries in 1 click. Free to use.
og.image_alt: One-Click Report AI — Automatic PDF report generator

faq.q: How do I generate a PDF report automatically?
faq.a: Upload a CSV or JSON file, choose your options (language, charts, context), and click 'Generate'. Your PDF report with AI summary is ready in seconds.
CSV and JSON files are supported. JSON files must contain an array of objects. Maximum 10,000 rows and 10 MB per file.

faq.q: Is the AI summary available in my language?
faq.a: Yes, AI summaries are generated in French, English, Spanish and German. The summary language matches the interface language.
Freemium mode allows up to 5 free reports. No sign-up required for the demo.
